summary: Complete testing of Input Spending Page (/admin/whitelist/spends) and bank info fields. 10/10 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features verified: navigation via 'Input Spending' nav link, month/year picker with arrows, inline spend edit (pencil icon), save with check button, auto-cashback calculation (15% of 5M = 750K), stats cards update, bar chart appears after adding spend, upload proof button available, bank info fields in user form, and bank info preservation on edit.

issues: Console warning: Recharts width/height -1 when chart container is not visible during initial render (pre-existing, non-blocking, cosmetic issue)

seed_data_creation: Test user 'UI Test User Bank' with bank info created and deleted after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Input Spending Page at /admin/whitelist/spends fully tested. Features: Month/year picker with prev/next arrows, inline spend edit via pencil icon, save with check button, auto-cashback calculation, stats cards (Total Spend/Cashback for selected month), bar chart 'Perbandingan Ad Spend per User' appears when spend data exists, upload proof button, proof link display. Bank info fields (Nama Bank, Nama Rekening, Nomor Rekening) added to whitelist user form and preserved on edit. Backend endpoint GET /api/admin/whitelist/spends/monthly?month=X&year=Y returns all users merged with spend data.

backend_api_tests: ✓ GET /api/admin/whitelist/spends/monthly - Returns all users merged with spend data
✓ Monthly spends endpoint works for different months
✓ Create spend and verify in monthly endpoint with auto-cashback
✓ Create user with bank info fields (bank_name, account_name, account_number)
✓ Bank info appears in monthly endpoint response
✓ Upload proof and verify URL accessible
frontend_ui_tests: ✓ Navigation to /admin/whitelist/spends via 'Input Spending' nav link
✓ Stats cards: Total Spend and Total Cashback for selected month
✓ Summary text '0/1 user sudah diinput' → '1/1 user sudah diinput' after adding spend
✓ Inline edit: click pencil icon, input fields appear for Ad Spend and Catatan
✓ Save with check button, cancel with X button
✓ Stats cards update after adding spend
✓ Bar chart 'Perbandingan Ad Spend per User' appears when spend data exists
✓ Upload proof button (upload icon) available after spend saved
✓ Create user with bank info fields in /admin/whitelist form
✓ Bank info visible in expanded user card: 'Bank BCA - John Doe Account (1234567890)'
✓ Edit user - bank info fields preserved (Bank BCA, John Doe Account, 1234567890)

features_verified.spending_page_navigation: Nav link 'Input Spending' added to AdminNav, routes to /admin/whitelist/spends
features_verified.month_year_picker: Dropdown for month, input for year, prev/next arrows, all working correctly
features_verified.inline_spend_edit: Pencil icon triggers edit mode with input fields, save/cancel buttons, auto-refresh after save
features_verified.auto_cashback_calculation: 15% of 5,000,000 = 750,000 correctly calculated on both create and update
features_verified.stats_cards: Total Spend and Total Cashback update dynamically after operations
features_verified.bar_chart: Chart with title 'Perbandingan Ad Spend per User' appears when spend data exists, tooltip shows user name and amount
features_verified.proof_upload: Upload button available after spend is saved, proof_url stored in DB
features_verified.bank_info_fields: Nama Bank, Nama Rekening, Nomor Rekening fields added to user form under 'INFORMASI REKENING' section
features_verified.bank_info_preservation: Bank info preserved when editing existing user
features_verified.bank_info_visibility: Bank info visible in expanded user card on Whitelist page
